relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: The third visit will require witness and grounded truth.
Paul warns that ongoing misalignment cannot be ignored.
They seek proof of Messiah speaking in him, and Messiah is powerful among them.
Crucified from weakness, Messiah lives by Divine power; Paul shares both weakness and life-power.
The community must test itself and recognize Messiah within.
Paul hopes they will see his own approvedness.
He prays not for his appearance, but that they do the beautiful good.
Truth cannot be opposed by true service.
Paul can rejoice in his weakness if their strength and restoration grow.
Authority is for building up, not tearing down.
The final call is joy, restoration, encouragement, shared mind, and peace.
All the holy ones send greeting.
Grace, Divine love, and Spirit-fellowship rest with all.

contemplative_note: 2 Corinthians 13 closes the letter by returning severity to restoration. The final frequency is grace, love, Spirit-fellowship, and peace.
